requests.title: No real canvass results uploaded
requests.why_needed: Current contact rate (22%) and turnout lift (6%) are configured estimates. No actual canvass data.
requests.what_it_improves: Turnout calibration, daily forecast accuracy, persuasion targeting
requests.recommended_ui_action: Enter Field Data in the War Room → Field tab.

requests.title: No volunteer shift logs entered
requests.why_needed: Volunteer capacity is estimated at 10/week from config. No actual shift data.
requests.what_it_improves: Field capacity forecast, GOTV achievability, weekly progress tracking.
requests.recommended_ui_action: Log volunteer shifts in War Room → Volunteers tab.

requests.title: No budget actuals entered
requests.why_needed: Current budget display shows planned allocations only. No actual spend has been entered.
requests.what_it_improves: Cash burn analysis, budget reallocation recommendations, burn-rate vs. timeline alerts.
requests.recommended_ui_action: Enter budget actuals in War Room → Budget tab.

requests.title: No contact ID results uploaded
requests.why_needed: Persuasion rate is modeled from party strength / age (estimated). No field ID data.
requests.what_it_improves: Persuasion model accuracy, supporter ID tracking, opposition count.
requests.recommended_ui_action: Upload contact results in War Room → Contacts tab.
